title: Hosting Direction and Production-Control Validation Decision Package
description: Assemble the hosted TEST comparison, unresolved production prerequisites, migration and rollback implications, operational obligations, and explicit human decision options into the next Enki hosting-direction package.
acceptance_criteria: The package binds the exact finalist validation evidence and comparative evaluation used for the decision
A recommended hosting direction is separated from human approval and includes explicit confidence, limitations, disqualifiers, and accepted risks

Cloud IAM, production identity federation, managed database row-level isolation, network segmentation, per-tenant production key management, production secrets management, and independent penetration testing each have an explicit validation or unresolved status
Production-control validation work is sequenced without representing provider capability as configured Enki evidence
Migration, rollback, disaster recovery, support ownership, cost guardrails, and portability consequences are explicit for the recommended direction
The decision options allow select, defer, request more evidence, or reject without default approval
No production deployment occurs until a separate explicit human production-hosting decision is recorded
